Issues: The subject matter (cozy pet portrait) is highly popular, making it inherently marketable but also bordering on cliché. This means it may compete with a very large pool of similar images, requiring strong marketing to stand out.
The extreme backlighting coming from the window causes some potential overexposure ('blowout') near the source, which could affect high-quality printing depending on the final crop/edit.
The composition, while effective, is a common trope (cat + window + books), which slightly lowers the 'uniqueness' score.
